# Smart Contract Transaction Parser

> A free, open-source tool for decoding and analyzing EVM smart contract transactions across 7 major blockchain networks.

## What This Tool Does

Smart Contract Transaction Parser decodes the raw calldata of any EVM blockchain transaction, revealing:
- Function name and selector (4-byte signature)
- Input parameters with names, types, and decoded values
- Gas consumption (gas used, gas price, effective gas price)
- Transaction status (success/reverted), block number, and timestamp
- Proxy contract detection and implementation address resolution

## Supported Chains

| Chain | Chain ID | Native Currency | Explorer |
|-------|----------|----------------|----------|
| Ethereum | 1 | ETH | etherscan.io |
| BNB Smart Chain | 56 | BNB | bscscan.com |
| Polygon | 137 | POL | polygonscan.com |
| Arbitrum One | 42161 | ETH | arbiscan.io |
| Optimism | 10 | ETH | optimistic.etherscan.io |
| Base | 8453 | ETH | basescan.org |
| Avalanche C-Chain | 43114 | AVAX | snowtrace.io |

## How ABI Resolution Works

The tool uses a waterfall pipeline to resolve contract ABIs automatically:
1. **Proxy Detection** — Checks EIP-1967, EIP-1167, and OpenZeppelin legacy proxy patterns
2. **Block Explorer API** — Fetches verified ABI from Etherscan-compatible APIs
3. **Sourcify** — Queries Sourcify's verified source repository (full match, then partial match)
4. **4bytes Directory** — Looks up function signature by 4-byte selector
5. **Manual Upload** — User can paste ABI JSON as a fallback

## Key Features

- Automatic ABI resolution (no manual input required for verified contracts)
- Proxy contract detection (EIP-1967 transparent proxy, EIP-1167 minimal proxy)
- Token amount formatting with 18-decimal precision display
- Raw hex value display alongside decoded values
- Multi-language support (English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese)
- Free to use, no registration required

## Technology Stack

- Next.js (App Router, SSG for SEO pages)
- viem (EVM interaction, calldata decoding)
- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- next-intl (internationalization)

## Pages

- Homepage: /en, /zh, /zh-tw
- Transaction Result: /[locale]/tx/[hash]?chain=[chainId]
- Chain Pages: /[locale]/chains/ethereum, /[locale]/chains/bsc, etc.
- Function Pages: /[locale]/functions/transfer, /[locale]/functions/approve, etc.

## Pricing

Free. $0. No registration required. No API key needed for end users.

## Contact

Website: https://txparser.dev
